movie.actors: Sean Connery, Wesley Snipes, Harvey Keitel, Cary-Hiroyuki Tagawa
movie.plot: When an escort girl is found dead in the offices of a Japanese company in Los Angeles, detectives Web Smith and John Connor act as liaison between the company's executives and the investigating cop Tom Graham.
movie.title: Rising Sun
movie.writer: Michael Crichton (novel), Philip Kaufman (screenplay), Michael Crichton (screenplay), Michael Backes (screenplay)
